title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: ViewR brings spreadsheet-style data exploration directly R workflow. single function call opens polished, popup-based interface lets filter, sort, search, edit, understand data.frame — automatically writes equivalent dplyr code never lose reproducibility.
code: library(ViewR) ViewR(mtcars)

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: Install release version CRAN: install development version GitHub: Run helper check install required dependencies:
code: install.packages("ViewR") # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("imaheshdivakaran/ViewR") install_viewr_deps()

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: entire interface controlled one function: ViewR() pipe-friendly returns (possibly modified) data frame invisibly user clicks Done:
code: ViewR(   data,   edit          = FALSE,   # enable Excel-like editing   popup         = TRUE,    # open as modal dialog   labels        = NULL,    # named vector of variable labels   title         = NULL,    # custom window title   viewer        = "dialog",# "dialog", "browser", or "pane"   generate_code = TRUE,    # show R Code tab   theme         = "flatly",# Bootstrap theme   max_display   = 50000L,  # row cap for rendering   return_data   = TRUE     # return (possibly edited) data on close ) library(dplyr)  clean_data <- mtcars |>   filter(cyl >= 4) |>   ViewR(edit = TRUE)   # open popup; result assigned on Done

title: Getting Started with ViewR

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: main data table powered DT package. supports: Global search (top-right table) Per-column filter boxes header Clickable column headers one-click ascending/descending sort Configurable page length (use Rows per page slider sidebar) supply labels (use dataset imported haven), column header show ⓘ tooltip full label hover.

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: Excel-like grid powered rhandsontable. can: Click cell type edit value directly Right-click row header insert / remove options Use Add Row button append blank row Undo Redo (unlimited) step change history Changes committed returned data frame click Done. Tip: Clear filters sorts editing ensure row positions map correctly back original data.

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: Search text pattern — literal regex — replace one columns. workflow : Choose column (columns) dropdown. Type Find string Replace string. Optionally tick Case sensitive, Regex, Exact cell match. Click Preview see diff table affected cells. Click Apply commit replacement.

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: Every action perform — filtering, sorting, showing/hiding columns, find--replace — translated dplyr pipeline displayed real time: Click Copy clipboard paste code directly script. Click Reset clear history find-replace edit operations (filter/sort/column code always live cleared independently).
code: library(dplyr)  mtcars_result <- mtcars |>   filter(     `cyl` == "6"   ) |>   arrange(desc(`mpg`)) |>   select(`mpg`, `cyl`, `hp`, `wt`)

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: ViewR automatically reads variable labels stored column attributes, produced haven, labelled, Hmisc: can also supply labels manually:
code: # df <- haven::read_sav("my_survey.sav") # ViewR(df)   # labels appear as tooltips automatically ViewR(mtcars,       labels = c(         mpg  = "Miles per Gallon",         cyl  = "Number of Cylinders",         disp = "Displacement (cu.in.)",         hp   = "Gross Horsepower",         wt   = "Weight (1000 lbs)"       ))

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: Choose Bootstrap theme supported shinythemes:
code: ViewR(iris, theme = "darkly")    # dark ViewR(iris, theme = "cerulean")  # light blue ViewR(iris, theme = "cosmo")     # clean & minimal ViewR(iris, theme = "sandstone") # warm beige

what: Opening in the browser or Viewer pane
title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: default ViewR opens modal dialog inside RStudio. Use viewer argument change :
code: # Open in the system browser (useful for large datasets) ViewR(iris, viewer = "browser")  # Open in the RStudio Viewer pane ViewR(iris, viewer = "pane")  # Or equivalently, set popup = FALSE (defaults to browser) ViewR(iris, popup = FALSE)

title: Getting Started with ViewR
text: edit = TRUE, clicking Done returns modified data frame: click Cancel, original unmodified data frame returned.
code: # Open the editor; assign the result corrected <- ViewR(survey_data, edit = TRUE)  # 'corrected' now contains all inline edits + any find-replace operations head(corrected)

title: Getting Started with ViewR
code: library(ViewR)  # Load a dataset (here we use the built-in survey proxy) data(Titanic) titanic_df <- as.data.frame(Titanic)  # Step 1 — Explore: inspect variable info and browse the data ViewR(titanic_df,       labels = c(Class    = "Passenger Class",                  Sex      = "Passenger Sex",                  Age      = "Age Group",                  Survived = "Survival Status",                  Freq     = "Count"),       theme  = "flatly")  # Step 2 — Clean: use Find & Replace inside the popup to #   standardise "Male" -> "M", "Female" -> "F"  # Step 3 — Filter & export: the R Code tab will have generated: #   titanic_df_result <- titanic_df |> #     filter(`Survived` == "Yes") |> #     arrange(desc(`Freq`)) # Copy, paste, and run!  # Step 4 — Edit specific cells if needed titanic_clean <- ViewR(titanic_df, edit = TRUE)

what: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
text: ViewR single-function R package opens feature-rich, popup-based Shiny interface interactively viewing, filtering, sorting, editing, analysing data frame – every operation reflected real-time copy-pasteable dplyr code.

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
text: Data View – searchable, paginated DT table optional variable-label tooltips per-column search filters Sidebar Filters – unlimited filter conditions 11 operators (==, !=, >, >=, <, <=, contains, starts , ends , NA, NA); combine rows / logic Multi-column Sort – add multiple sort levels; choose ascending descending per column Column Visibility – show/hide columns one click via checkboxes Excel-like Editor (edit = TRUE) – powered rhandsontable; supports -cell editing, adding/deleting rows, unlimited undo/redo Find & Replace – search literal text regex across one columns; case-sensitivity exact-match options; preview applying Variable Info tab – data type, N, missing %, unique count, min/max, sample values every column R Code Generation – R Code tab always shows complete, runnable dplyr pipeline current UI state; one click copies clipboard

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
text: Install optional dependencies :
code: # From CRAN (once published): install.packages("ViewR")  # Development version from GitHub: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("itsmdivakaran/ViewR") ViewR::install_viewr_deps()

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
code: library(ViewR)  # Basic viewer -- popup dialog ViewR(mtcars)  # Edit mode: returns modified data frame when you click Done new_iris <- ViewR(iris, edit = TRUE)  # Custom variable labels + dark theme ViewR(mtcars,       labels = c(mpg = "Miles per Gallon",                  cyl = "Number of Cylinders",                  hp  = "Gross Horsepower"),       theme  = "darkly")  # Open in the system browser ViewR(iris, viewer = "browser")  # Works with haven-imported SPSS/Stata files (labels read automatically) # df <- haven::read_sav("my_survey.sav") # ViewR(df)

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
code: ViewR(   data,   edit          = FALSE,   popup         = TRUE,   labels        = NULL,   title         = NULL,   viewer        = c("dialog", "browser", "pane"),   generate_code = TRUE,   theme         = c("flatly", "cerulean", "cosmo", "darkly",                     "lumen", "paper", "readable", "sandstone",                     "simplex", "spacelab", "united", "yeti"),   max_display   = 50000L,   return_data   = TRUE )

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
text: applying filters sort UI, R Code tab shows:
code: library(dplyr)  mtcars_result <- mtcars |>   filter(     `cyl` == "6" &     `hp` >= 110   ) |>   arrange(`mpg`)

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
code: +-----------------------------------------------------+ | [=] ViewR -- mtcars         [rows/cols info] [Done] | +------------------+----------------------------------+ | FILTERS  [+ add] | [Data] [Edit] [F&R] [Info] [Code]| |                  |                                  | | SORT     [+ add] |   Searchable, paginated DT table | |                  |                                  | | COLUMNS          |   (or Edit / Find-Replace /      | |  [x] mpg         |    Variable Info / R Code tab)   | |  [x] cyl         |                                  | |  [ ] disp        |                                  | |                  |                                  | | DISPLAY          |                                  | |  Rows per page   |                                  | +------------------+----------------------------------+

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R
text: Required (installed automatically): shiny, miniUI, DT, rhandsontable, shinyjs, shinythemes, htmltools, jsonlite Suggested (specific features): haven (variable labels .sav/.dta files), dplyr (generated code), tibble (tibble input)

title: ViewR — Interactive Data Viewer for R

what: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR-package
title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR-package
text: Provides feature-rich, popup-based interactive interface viewing, exploring, filtering, sorting, editing, analysing R data frames. Key features include: searchable, paginated data table variable-label 'tooltips'; multi-condition filters (/) operators equality, comparison, pattern matching, missingness; multi-column sorting; column visibility management; Excel-like cell editor powered 'rhandsontable'; find--replace across one columns (literal regex); automatic 'dplyr' code generation reflects every operation performed 'UI'; Variable Info tab type, missing values, summary statistics. entire interface launched single call ViewR() works popup dialog, 'RStudio' Viewer pane, system browser.

title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR-package
text: Maintainer: Mahesh Divakaran imaheshdivakaran@gmail.com

what: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
text: Opens feature-rich, popup-based Shiny interface viewing, exploring, filtering, sorting, editing, analysing R data frames. operations reflected real-time copy-pasteable dplyr code.

title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
code: ViewR(   data,   edit = FALSE,   popup = TRUE,   labels = NULL,   title = NULL,   viewer = c("dialog", "browser", "pane"),   generate_code = TRUE,   theme = c("flatly", "cerulean", "cosmo", "darkly", "lumen", "paper", "readable",     "sandstone", "simplex", "spacelab", "united", "yeti"),   max_display = 50000L,   return_data = TRUE,   ... )

title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
text: data data.frame tibble view / edit. edit Logical. Enable Excel-like editing tab. Default FALSE. popup Logical. TRUE (default), open popup dialog; FALSE, open system browser. labels Optional named character vector variable labels. Names must match column names data. NULL, labels read column attributes (e.g.\ set haven). title Window title. Defaults name data. viewer display interface: "dialog" Popup dialog (default popup = TRUE). "browser" System web browser. "pane" RStudio Viewer pane. generate_code Logical. Show R Code tab. Default TRUE. theme Bootstrap theme UI.  One "flatly" (default), "cerulean", "cosmo", "darkly", "lumen", "paper", "readable", "sandstone", "simplex", "spacelab", "united", "yeti". max_display Integer. Maximum rows rendered Data View table (performance). Default 50000. return_data Logical. user clicks Done, return (possibly edited) data frame.  Default TRUE. ... Reserved future arguments; currently ignored.

title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
text: return_data = TRUE user clicked Done,   returns modified data frame invisibly.  Otherwise returns   original data frame invisibly.

title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
text: Data View - searchable, paginated DT table optional         variable-label tooltips column-level search filters. Sidebar Filters - add unlimited filter conditions         operators ==, !=, >, >=, <,         <=, contains, starts , ends ,         NA, NA; combine / logic. Multi-column Sort - add multiple sort levels; choose         ascending descending per column. Column Visibility - show/hide columns via checkboxes. Excel-like Editor (edit = TRUE) - powered         rhandsontable; supports -cell editing, adding rows,         unlimited undo/redo. Find & Replace - find literal text regex across one         columns case-sensitivity exact-match options; preview         changes applying. Variable Info - data type, N, missing          min, max, sample values every column. R Code Generation - R Code tab always shows         complete, runnable dplyr pipeline current state.         One click copies clipboard.

title: ViewR: Interactive Data Viewer, Filter, and Editor — ViewR
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ ## -- Basic view ------------------------------------------------------------ ViewR(mtcars)  ## -- Edit mode: returns modified data ------------------------------------- new_iris <- ViewR(iris, edit = TRUE)  ## -- Custom labels + dark theme -------------------------------------------- ViewR(mtcars,       labels = c(mpg = "Miles per Gallon",                  cyl = "Number of Cylinders",                  hp  = "Gross Horsepower"),       theme  = "darkly")  ## -- Open in the system browser -------------------------------------------- ViewR(iris, viewer = "browser", generate_code = TRUE)  ## -- View a haven-imported dataset (labels read automatically) ------------- # df <- haven::read_sav("my_survey.sav") # ViewR(df) } # }

title: Install All ViewR Dependencies — install_viewr_deps
code: install_viewr_deps(ask = TRUE)

title: Install All ViewR Dependencies — install_viewr_deps
text: ask Logical. TRUE (default), prompt installing.

title: Install All ViewR Dependencies — install_viewr_deps
text: Invisibly returns character vector packages (  needed ) installed.

title: Install All ViewR Dependencies — install_viewr_deps
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ install_viewr_deps() } # }

title: ViewR 0.2.0
text: Excel-like editor (edit = TRUE): powered rhandsontable, supports inline cell editing, row addition via right-click context menu Add Row button, unlimited undo / redo. Find & Replace tab: search literal string, regex pattern, exact cell value across one columns. live Preview diff table shows matched cells changes committed. Variable Info tab: one-row-per-column summary data type, N, missing count, missing %, unique count, min, max, sample values. R Code tab (generate_code = TRUE): live dplyr pipeline reflects current filters, sorts, column selections, find--replace operations. Copy clipboard button included. Multi-condition Filters / logic eleven operators: ==, !=, >, >=, <, <=, contains, starts , ends , NA, NA. Multi-column Sort: add many ordered sort levels needed, independently ascending descending. Column visibility panel: show / hide column; bulk / None toggles. Variable labels: automatically read column "label" attributes (e.g. haven::read_spss()); displayed hoverable tooltips column headers Data View table. Twelve Bootstrap themes via shinythemes: "flatly", "cerulean", "cosmo", "darkly", "lumen", "paper", "readable", "sandstone", "simplex", "spacelab", "united", "yeti". install_viewr_deps(): helper detect install required packages one call. Pipe-friendly: ViewR() accepts piped input returns working data frame invisibly user clicks Done.

title: ViewR 0.2.0
text: Type coercion find--replace longer depends methods::(); replaced explicit switch() original column class.

title: ViewR 0.2.0
text: Separated UI, server, helpers, code-generation concerns dedicated source files (R/ui.R, R/server.R, R/helpers.R, R/code_gen.R). Full testthat (edition 3) test suite covering filter engine, sort engine, find--replace, variable info, code generation. Added vignettes/ViewR-intro.Rmd introduction vignette. Added _pkgdown.yml package website. Hex sticker added inst/sticker/.

title: ViewR 0.1.0
text: Initial release: basic ViewR() stub.
